data.title: Q2 success for Standard Premium shows improved efficiency and company growth, achieving impressive results.
data.description: The latest data reveals a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the national average rising to 6.9% in the past month. This surge represents a jump of 1.5 percentage points compared to the previous period. Furthermore, the number of jobless individuals in the country has reached 12.3 million, marking a substantial uptick of 2.7 million. The current situation reflects the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amidst the economic uncertainty caused by the global pandemic.

data.title: Chinese VCs shift focus to crypto; Tian Tu Capital pivots to tech. Klook eyes US listing. Adaptation in changing market.
data.description: Smaller venture capital firms are making significant shifts in their investment strategies, with China Renaissance (1911.HK) venturing into cryptocurrency and Tian Tu Capital (1973.HK) moving from consumer goods to technology. Meanwhile, online travel agent Klook is planning a major IPO in the U.S. These moves reflect a broader trend of adaptation in a rapidly changing landscape. Despite crypto trading being technically illegal in China, Chinese venture capital firms are increasingly investing in cryptocurrency through Hong Kong platforms. The pivot towards technology by Tian Tu Capital highlights the changing dynamics of the consumer sector in China. The story indicates a shift towards more venture capital investments in cryptocurrency and technology sectors.

data.title: Bank of America sees potential for US banks to launch stablecoins due to the GENIUS Act, expects supply to grow $25-75 billion.
data.description: Bank of America believes the recently signed GENIUS Act will play a crucial role in regulating stablecoins in the U.S. This legislation, approved by President Donald Trump, is expected to boost infrastructure development and promote competition in the digital finance industry. According to reports, stablecoins—digital tokens supported by fiat currencies or commodities like gold—are projected to experience modest growth in the coming months. Bank of America forecasts their supply to rise by $25 billion to $75 billion due to new regulations. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Solana devs are working on roadmap to establish network as hub for internet capital markets. #crypto #blockchain
data.description: Top developers of Solana have come together to support a strategic plan with the goal of solidifying the platform as the leading hub for internet-based capital markets.

data.title: Loomis AB expands Pharma business by acquiring Kipfer-Logistik GmbH in Switzerland. 100% ownership deal.
data.description: In Stockholm, Sweden on July 24, 2025, it was announced that Loomis AB has made a significant business move by acquiring Kipfer-Logistik GmbH. The acquisition involves Loomis International Corporate AG purchasing the entire stake, totaling 100% ownership of Kipfer-Logistik. The acquired company, known for its expertise in logistics services, is based in Switzerland. This strategic acquisition further strengthens Loomis AB's global presence and capabilities in the logistics sector.

data.title: Versiv Composites and Bron Aerotech partner to supply Beta Cloth Fabric to customers worldwide for space applications.
data.description: In a recent update, Versiv Composites and Bron Aerotech, Inc. shared that they have commenced the shipping of Beta Cloth Fabric to global customers operating in space-related industries. The fabric is specifically designed for demanding applications in the space sector. This collaboration between Versiv Composites and Bron Aerotech will cater to the needs of clients worldwide, providing essential materials for space missions. The announcement, made on July 24, 2025, signifies a significant milestone for the companies involved and highlights their commitment to serving the space industry.

data.title: Altesa BioSciences to present Vapendavir data at ERS Congress 2025, showing COPD symptom improvement after Rhinovirus infection.
data.description: Altesa will be presenting data on Vapendavir at the upcoming ERS Late Breaker Session and at a symposium with prominent global COPD experts in Atlanta on July 24, 2025. Vapendavir has shown a consistent benefit in enhancing COPD symptoms following Rhinovirus infection, which is identified as the primary cause of COPD exacerbations. The findings highlight the significant potential of Vapendavir in addressing COPD-related issues, with experts convening to discuss its impact on patients.

data.title: Teledyne HiRel released TDD416Y12NEPBM01 - compact DDR4 memory module, DDR4-3200, 16 GByte, operates from -40°C to +105°C.
data.description: Teledyne HiRel Semiconductors, based in Milpitas, California, has unveiled the TDD416Y12NEPBM01 DDR4 memory module. This ruggedized semiconductor is suited for mission-critical settings and is designated as an Enhanced Product (EP). It can operate in temperatures ranging from -40°C to +105°C. The TDD416Y12NEPBM01 is a compact DDR4-3200 memory module, smaller in size than a postage stamp, offering high bandwidth in a reduced footprint. This release aims to provide a reliable solution for demanding environments.

data.title: Inventor from Kissimmee, Fla. develops F C INVENTION, a combo bed sheet and mattress cover, for easy bed-making.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Kissimmee, Florida, shared plans for a new creation dubbed the F C INVENTION. This innovative product serves as both a bed sheet and a mattress cover, streamlining the bed making process. The inventor aimed to simplify tasks and conserve energy, effectively eliminating the need for guessing. The F C INVENTION is designed to offer efficiency and ease, making it a potential game-changer for consumers seeking convenience in their daily lives.

data.title: Hilco Real Estate Sales partnered with Onyx Asset Advisors to sell bankrupt food processing facility in San Diego, with 28,900± SF, in Vista Pacific Business Park.
data.description: Hilco Real Estate Sales, partnering with Onyx Asset Advisors, has disclosed the bankruptcy sale of a food processing center spanning approximately 28,900 square feet in San Diego. Situated within the Vista Pacific Business Park at 2614-16 Temple Heights, the sale includes the center's equipment.

data.title: Sonata Software partners with Wharton AI to study Agentic AI in enterprise ops to advance understanding.
data.description: Sonata Software (NSE: [stock symbol]) has recently joined forces with WAIAI as their latest Thought Leadership Partner. This collaboration will delve into the realms of Agentic AI, focusing on both the opportunities and challenges present in this sector. Through fostering academic-industry dialogues and engaging in collaborative learning, the two institutions aim to deepen their understanding of the Agentic AI landscape. The partnership, initiated in EAST BRUNSWICK, N.J. and BENGALURU, India, holds significant promise for innovative advancements in the field.

data.title: Analysts predict Ethereum can surge as the price hits $3.6K, eyeing $4.5K resistance with strong support levels.
data.description: The price of Ethereum is expected to continue rising, with significant resistance at $4,500 and multiple crucial support levels below.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) launches Protocol 23, allowing CAP-67 to emit events for both past and future ledgers. Learn more about developer opportunities and upgrade options.
data.description: The implementation of Stellar (XLM)'s Protocol 23 introduces the capability for CAP-67 to emit events related to both past and future ledgers. This enhancement has significant implications for developers, as it enables them to access crucial data and information from a broader timeline. By understanding the available upgrade paths, developers can effectively leverage this feature to enhance their applications and services on the Stellar network.

data.title: AVAX surges to $24.41 with bullish momentum, based on record 20M daily transactions and ETF speculation.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently being traded at $24.41, showing bullish technical indicators. The market is observing record-high daily transactions of 20 million, contributing to a positive sentiment among investors. Additionally, there is heightened interest due to speculation surrounding the potential inclusion of AVAX in ETFs.
